summary: The main claim is: This indicates that CPMs are more robust to overoptimization than standard PMs.
We show that CPMs, compared with standard preference models (PMs), generalize better and are more robust to reward model overoptimization.
The main claim is: It's a very important conceptual clarification that has changed how I think about many issues bearing on technical AI safety.

top_comment.author: Max H
top_comment.text:
This seems questionable. Humans are pretty good at "direct optimization" when they want to be (a point mentioned in the original post).

And it seems straightforward to construct artificial systems that behave even more like "direct optimizers" than humans, even if some or all of the component pieces of those systems are made out of function-approximators. Mu Zero is a good example; I sketched what a "real world" version might look like here.

To me, "amortized optimization" seems like just one tool in the toolbox of actual optimization, which is about choosing actions that steer towards outcomes.
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: Humans are pretty good at "direct optimization" when they want to be (a point mentioned in the original post).

summary: The main claim is: My current idea is to pay an equal amount monthly to Miri.
I don't want to accelerate an arms race, and paying for access to GPT seems like a perfect way to be a raindrop in a dangerous flood.
The main claim is: To argue for what makes singular learning theory different and why I think it the likeliest contender for an eventual grand unified theory of learning .

The main claim is: First of all, alignment research and capabilities research look quite different up close.
GPT models are already useful for doing alignment research and intellectual augmentation more generally.
The main claim is: The main problem with the Vermont group house is that there's currently only three of them.

The main claim is: Any AI safety research that is likely to be in the AGI’s training set should be assumed compromised.
The main claim is: MATH results are on the left and MMLU results are on the right.
Finetuning on the MATH dataset didn't improve Minerva, but did improve PaLM significantly.
The main claim is: When asking Godzilla to fight Mega-Godzilla, those problems are not recoverable.
The main claim is: How to pursue conceptual alignment research: Again, I don’t really know.
Anyway, here’s what I’ve got: Theoretical alignment work can be more conceptual or more mathematical .
